content.rendered: Sam is a seasoned cybersecurity executive who leads AMI’s global IT strategy, risk management, digital transformation, and technology operations. With a strong focus on innovation, security and efficiency, Sam plays a key role in aligning technology with business objectives, ensuring scalable and secure IT solutions that enhance productivity and customer experiences. Sam provides executive oversight of risk management, including identifying and mitigating security risks in all corporate functions and external-facing products and solutions. He attended Kennesaw State University.
